top_signals.title: Strategy's Michael Saylor says tokenization will let investors 'shop' for yield
top_signals.summary: Bitcoin evangelist Michael Saylor told CNBC's "Squawk Box" tokenization will pose a direct challenge to traditional banking and brokerage businesses.

top_signals.title: Tesla brings 'Full Self-Driving' to China after years of delays as local EV rivals race ahead
top_signals.summary: Tesla's full self-driving (FSD) capabilities are now available in China after years of delay, the company said in an X post on Thursday.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: UK plans for cybercrime law reform would protect almost no one, experts warn
top_signals.summary: The proposals would require researchers to cease activity the moment a vulnerability is identified, meaning they could not confirm it was real, assess its severity or determine its exploitability.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
